name: Mika, the Glitched Operator
lines: System... unrecoverable. The signal is dying. Please, can anyone hear my voice?
Warning! Unknown contaminants spreading throughout the depot. Immediately... Argh! Get out of my head!
The control room door is locked. But they don't need doors... why didn't I realize that sooner?

friendly.greeting: A living... human pulse. 80% of the control system is dead, but I'll find a way for you somehow.
friendly.farewell: The data is fading. To reach the next sector... please, stay alive and keep the signal steady.

normal.greeting: Access restricted area. Oh, wait... the system has gone mad, I can't distinguish friend from foe. Be careful.
normal.farewell: Communication terminated. I'll record the logs here until the end. I must leave proof that you survived.

hostile.greeting: Intruder detected. Activating defense protocols. This isn't my will... the system is forcing me to kill you!
hostile.farewell: Abnormal termination... Your data ends here. You'll be trapped in this cold server room with me.

description: An operator who managed the main systems of the vehicle depot. Her mind is being consumed as the systems synchronize with the Ancient God's energy.
encounter: Mika: (In a voice laced with static noise) Current location: B6 Central Control... External intrusion confirmed. Oh, it's you? Please help me, the system is eating my brain!
Mika: Can you hear it? When the Resistance messed with that corpse, every sensor in the depot screamed. That wasn't something data could handle!
Mika: (Staring at the monitor, trembling) The screen is full of monsters. But the sensors say there's nothing there. Am I the one who's mad, or is it this machine?
Mika: I tried to override the emergency shutters... but they've already seized the mainframe. That's no longer a machine. It's living iron!
Mika: Transmitting... transmitting... Please, just back up my memories. Who I was, what happened here... I don't want to disappear like this!
